examples: From a concealed vantage point, he saw a car arrive.
The cafe was a good vantage point for watching the world go by.
From this vantage point he watched, his searching eye never missing a detail.
The perspective held that high confrontation would allow the strongest vantage points (and executives) to prevail.
Vantage Reporting specializes in software for alternative investing such as private equity and venture capital.
